name: Vowkeeper
why: A powerful Legendary support relic that enhances the durability and consistency of Horde teams. It provides excellent utility in prolonged battles, though it is generally considered a secondary investment behind top-tier Legendary relics like Eternal Wings and Persecution.
description: Activates Vowkeeper's Blessing to strengthen allied heroes and improve their survivability during combat. Its reliable support effects make it a strong choice for Horde-focused lineups and a valuable addition to late-game teams.
